plan.macro_notes: VIX +7.95% to 18.87 — minor caution. QQQ -0.32%, SPY -0.20%. Small caps positive (+0.57%).
plan.screener_result: 0 candidates across all tiers (Super/Perfect/Leader/Watchlist) out of 623 scanned
plan.decision: Stand aside. No qualifying Minervini setups = no trades.

reflection: Session 2026-04-20: No action taken. Regime tape-read was constructive (SPY strong, above both MAs, no high-vol breakdown), but the Minervini screener returned zero candidates in every tier — Super, Perfect, Leader, and even Watchlist were all empty out of 623 scanned names. This is the clearest possible signal to stay in cash: even in a 'strong' SPY regime, if no individual stocks are setting up in proper VCP/trend templates, there is no edge to deploy. The VIX jumping ~8% in a single session while SPY drifted only -0.2% also hints at hedging/distribution under the surface. The disciplined action is to wait for the screener to produce candidates again rather than drop standards and fish in the 'other' bucket. No new learned rule needed — this is exactly the baseline methodology working as designed. Weighted evidence-backed rules (avoid low_volume_warning, far_from_high, weak_3m_momentum) were not tested today since no trades were placed.
